subcodes.first_line: The remembrance from Our presence unto those who have attained unto the lights of the Bayán, when the All-Merciful came with manifest sovereignty, that thou mayest recount [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا الی الذینهم فازوا بانوار البیان اذ اتی الرحمن بسلطان مبین لتحدث
subcodes.subjects: @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @idolatry, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
